name: tokengraph
description: Reduce wasted Codex context with local code, SQL, memory, and log routing.

interface.shortDescription: Route Codex through compact local project context before raw files.
interface.longDescription: TokenGraph indexes the current project locally and gives Codex a compact code graph, resolved import graph, SQL graph with PostgreSQL object and RLS policy detail, memory graph with lifecycle metadata, local project wiki, project map, multimodal-safe visual map export with resource links and Markdown fallbacks, index and wiki freshness status, reset controls, schema-versioned local config, profile-aware context planning, quality-first context compression, incremental indexing, memory review, memory recall and curation, schema-versioned JSON persistence, architecture rules, architecture checks, failure tracing, regression risk assessment, benchmark harness, trust documentation, host-neutral MCP documentation, reference explanation, log compressor, token savings report, CLI smoke validation, self-contained MCP runtime bundling, release packaging, and fixture-backed scanner/planner regression coverage. It does not require a paid API key or cloud service.
defaultPrompt: Plan context before reading raw files.
